source: cBioPortal REST API, TCGA PanCancer Atlas (_tcga_pan_can_atlas_2018)

validation.note: Lower percentile = lower raw ACSL4 RSEM (more refractory-leaning). Cross-study RSEM medians carry batch effects, so this ranking is qualitative; the Doll-2017 claim is that HCC/AML are constitutively ACSL4-low.
